creator: wollman@bimajority.org
text:
Building a package of devel/git 1.9.0_1 errors out with a packaging
failure.

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: 
poudriere bulk devel/git

Build log excerpts:

maintained by: wxs@FreeBSD.org

Poudriere version: 3.0.14
